name: Artificial Intelligence
headline: How machines learn, reason, and reshape industries
description: From foundation models to autonomous agents — tracking the technology that's rewriting every industry.

name: AI Agents
headline: Autonomous systems that think, plan, and act
description: The next evolution beyond chatbots — AI systems that can reason, use tools, and complete complex tasks independently.

name: Biotechnology
headline: Engineering biology to solve impossible problems
description: Gene therapy, synthetic biology, drug discovery, and the convergence of biology with computation.

name: De-Extinction
headline: Bringing lost species back from the edge
description: The science and ethics of resurrecting extinct species — from woolly mammoths to thylacines.

name: Artificial Womb
headline: Growing life outside the body
description: Ectogenesis technology, ex-utero development, and the future of neonatal care and species conservation.

name: Robotics
headline: Machines that move through the physical world
description: Humanoid robots, surgical systems, autonomous vehicles, and the hardware side of AI.

name: Semiconductors
headline: The silicon foundations of everything
description: Chip design, fabrication, supply chains, and the geopolitics of semiconductor dominance.

name: Venture Capital
headline: Where the money meets the mission
description: Funding rounds, market dynamics, and the investors backing breakthrough science and technology.

name: Health
headline: Optimizing the human machine
description: Evidence-based approaches to longevity, cognitive enhancement, metabolic health, and preventive medicine.

name: Longevity
headline: The science of living longer and better
description: Aging research, senolytics, caloric restriction, and the quest to extend healthy human lifespan.
